fonts.usage: Massive cinematic headlines, awe-inspiring section titles.
Clean, highly readable body copy for scientific descriptions.
Technical data readouts, coordinates, UI labels, overlines.

brand.primary_description: Bioluminescent Gold / Synaptic Amber (for action potentials and flashes)
brand.secondary_description: Deep Azure Blue (for resting state neurons, myelin sheaths, structure)
brand.accent_description: Phosphorescent White (for highlights and intense energy bursts)

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing, optical alignment, and high drama. Use 'Crystal Glass' surfaces floating above the 3D canvas.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento 'Tetris' Grid for UI elements overlaid on the 3D scene. Avoid center-everything. Use asymmetrical placements.

surfaces.cards: rounded-none or max rounded-md to maintain a technical/cinematic edge.

components_strategy.buttons: Flat dark surfaces with a 1px border of white/20, hover state brightens border to white/60 and text to pure white. Mono font.
components_strategy.navigation: Sticky crystal glass header with minimal links. z-50.
components_strategy.floating_labels: Used in the interactive 3D explorer. Connected by SVG lines to 3D coordinates. Glassmorphism boxes with mono font readouts.

scrollytelling_flow.engine: Lenis for smooth scrolling, Framer Motion for UI reveals, React Three Fiber (R3F) + Drei for the 3D canvas.
scrollytelling_flow.structure: A single sticky 100vh canvas in the background. Scroll progress (0 to 1) drives the camera Z-position and scene transitions.

stages.action: Camera moves through a starfield (particle system) that coalesces into a glowing human silhouette (points/mesh).
Silhouette transitions to a volumetric brain model. The camera pushes into the cerebral cortex, revealing gyri and sulci.
Macro transition: The brain surface dissolves into a network of multipolar pyramidal neurons. We focus on a single massive neuron with dendrites and a glowing soma.
Extreme close-up on the synaptic cleft. Particles (neurotransmitters) fire across the gap, triggering a massive 'Bioluminescent Gold' light burst.
Camera races at warp speed along the axon (spinal cord highway), ending with an energetic flash representing limb muscle activation.

images.description: Milky Way galaxy texture. Use this subtly blended into the background canvas or as an environment map to ground the 'cosmic' scale before zooming into the microscopic.
Orion constellation stars. Use as a subtle multiply/screen layer over the dark void for deep space texture.

icons.usage: Use sparingly. Primarily for UI controls (Zoom, Pan, Info, Sound) and arrow indicators. 1px stroke weight for a refined technical look.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over the 3D canvas has sufficient drop-shadow or a glassmorphism backdrop to remain legible against bright flashes.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, nav links, explorer hot-spots) MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='explore-cortex-btn').
accessibility_and_testing.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Provide a fallback static gallery mode or toggle for users who cannot tolerate the intense 3D zoom.

instructions_to_main_agent: Create a global scroll hook that passes a normalized progress value (0 to 1) down to the R3F components.

Do not attempt to load massive 3D models via URLs if they aren't provided. Instead, procedurally generate the neurons using instanced meshes, curves (CatmullRomCurve3 for axons/dendrites), and particle systems (Points) for the cosmic/synaptic dust.
Use Post-processing (`@react-three/postprocessing`) to add intense Bloom for the action potentials and synaptic flashes.
The UI should float over the canvas using fixed/sticky positioning and pointer-events-none where necessary.
Follow the exact color palette (Deep Void, Azure, Amber). NO PURPLE OR TEAL.
Ensure all fonts are imported correctly (Cormorant Garamond, Outfit, IBM Plex Mono) and applied globally.
